CreateDocument key=1 doctype=<none>
CreateDocumentType key=2 name="html" public-id=<none> system-id=<none>
AppendChild parent=1 child=2
CreateElement key=3 ns=html local="html" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=1 child=3
CreateElement key=4 ns=html local="head" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=4
CreateElement key=5 ns=html local="body" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=3 child=5
CreateElement key=6 ns=html local="a" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=5 child=6
CreateText key=7 text="one"
AppendChild parent=6 child=7
CreateElement key=8 ns=html local="a" attrs=[]
AppendChild parent=5 child=8
Batch index=1 size=2
CreateText key=9 text="two"
AppendChild parent=8 child=9
